title: Colette Corpus — Therapeutic Patient Education for Liver Transplant Recipients
description: Information and therapeutic patient education (TPE) corpus for liver transplant patients: clinical factsheets and a reference question-and-answer database, developed and validated by the healthcare team at the Henri Bismuth Hepato-Biliary Center (Paul-Brousse Hospital, AP-HP).
